message:
fix(nats): escape C1 control chars by codepoint, not UTF-8 bytes

nats_json_escape() was iterating UTF-8 bytes and emitting \uXXXX per
byte for control characters. C1 controls (U+0080-U+009F) are 2 bytes
in UTF-8, so U+0080 was incorrectly escaped as \u00c2\u0080 instead
of \u0080. Fix: emit a single \u escape using the char's u32 value.

3 regression tests added.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
